data.summary_suggestion: List custom classes in a location
data.description_suggestion: Lists all custom classes in the specified location. Custom classes represent sets of words or phrases that are likely to appear in audio, such as passenger ship names. Returns a paginated list of custom classes with their configurations and metadata.
data.reasoning: Original description is too minimal. Added context about what custom classes represent (domain terminology), clarified the scope (location-based), and explained the return value includes pagination. Summary was missing entirely. These improvements help AI agents understand the operation's purpose and when to use it.

message: Operation 'speech.projects.locations.customClasses.create' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description lacks actionable detail. Added explanation of what custom classes are (domain context), what inputs are required, and what is returned. Missing summary entirely. These additions enable AI agents to understand the operation's purpose, required inputs, and expected outputs.

data.summary_suggestion: Create a custom class for speech recognition
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new custom class in the specified location. A custom class represents a set of words or phrases that are likely to appear in audio (e.g., product names, locations). The request must include the custom class configuration with items and display name. Returns the created custom class resource with its assigned resource name and metadata.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks actionable detail. Added explanation of what custom classes are (domain context), what inputs are required, and what is returned. Missing summary entirely. These additions enable AI agents to understand the operation's purpose, required inputs, and expected outputs.

message: Operation 'speech.projects.locations.phraseSets.list' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. data.summary_suggestion: List phrase sets in a location
data.description_suggestion: Lists all phrase sets in the specified location. Phrase sets provide hints to the speech recognizer to favor specific words and phrases in recognition results. Returns a paginated list of phrase sets with their configurations and metadata.
data.reasoning: Original description is too minimal and lacks domain context. Added explanation of phrase sets' purpose (speech recognition hints), clarified location scope, and explained pagination in results. Missing summary entirely. These improvements help AI agents understand when and why to use this operation.

data.current_description: Create a set of phrase hints. Each item in the set can be a single word or a multi-word phrase. The items in the PhraseSet are favored by the recognition model when you send a call that includes the PhraseSet.
data.summary_suggestion: Create a phrase set for speech recognition hints
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new phrase set in the specified location. A phrase set contains words or phrases (single or multi-word) that the speech recognition model will favor when processing audio that includes the phrase set. The request must include the phrase set configuration with items and display name. Returns the created phrase set resource with its assigned resource name and metadata.
data.reasoning: Description explains the concept well but lacks input/output details and is missing a summary. Added clarity about required inputs (configuration, display name), what is returned (resource with name and metadata), and added a concise summary. These additions improve AI agent interpretability regarding what data to provide and what to expect in response.

message: Operation 'speech.operations.list' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary was empty and description lacked context about what operations are being listed (speech recognition), what inputs are expected (filter parameters), and what the response contains. data.current_description: Lists operations that match the specified filter in the request. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `UNIMPLEMENTED`.
data.description_suggestion: Lists long-running speech recognition operations that match the specified filter criteria. Supports filtering by operation name, status, and other attributes. Returns a paginated list of Operation objects representing asynchronous speech recognition tasks. If the server doesn't support this method, returns an UNIMPLEMENTED error.
data.reasoning: Original summary was empty and description lacked context about what operations are being listed (speech recognition), what inputs are expected (filter parameters), and what the response contains. Added domain context about long-running operations, clarified the operation type, and explained the paginated response format for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Gets the latest state of a long-running operation. Clients can use this method to poll the operation result at intervals as recommended by the API service.
data.summary_suggestion: Get long-running speech recognition operation status
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the latest state of a long-running speech recognition operation by operation name. Returns the current Operation object including status, progress, and results if available. Clients should poll this method at intervals recommended by the API service to track asynchronous speech recognition task completion.
data.reasoning: Original summary was empty. Description was adequate but lacked specificity about the operation domain (speech recognition) and what the returned Operation object contains. Enhanced to clarify this is for speech recognition operations and what information is returned.

message: Operation 'speech.speech.recognize' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary was empty. Description lacked details about expected inputs (RecognizeRequest), response structure (RecognizeResponse with SpeechRecognitionResult), and the blocking nature of the operation. Enhanced to clarify input/output schemas and what information is returned for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Performs synchronous speech recognition: receive results after all audio has been sent and processed.
data.description_suggestion: Performs synchronous speech recognition on provided audio data. Accepts a RecognizeRequest containing audio content and recognition configuration. Processes the entire audio and returns a RecognizeResponse with zero or more SpeechRecognitionResult messages containing transcribed text, confidence scores, and alternative interpretations. Blocks until all audio is processed.
data.reasoning: Original summary was empty. Description lacked details about expected inputs (RecognizeRequest), response structure (RecognizeResponse with SpeechRecognitionResult), and the blocking nature of the operation. Enhanced to clarify input/output schemas and what information is returned for better AI agent decision-making.

data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing custom class resource with new word or phrase definitions. Accepts a CustomClass object with updated content.
